billingsoftware/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
billingsoftware/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

billingsoftware/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency to resolve missing javax.xml.bind classes in Java 11+.
billingsoftware/pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11+ removed JAXB from the standard library; without this dependency, code using javax.xml.bind will fail to compile.

billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in JDK 21 environments.
billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3+), causing compile errors for missing classes.
